data.title: The GPS repurchase address has completed the destruction of 177 million GPS, worth $3.07 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa’s monitoring, 10 minutes ago, the GPS repurchase address had completed the destruction of 177 million GPS, worth 3.07 million US dollars. Previously, the project party promised to repurchase GPS worth 4.34 million USDT. From March 19 to April 14, it had withdrawn tokens worth 4.04 million US dollars from Binance in 7 times, and the repurchase was basically completed.

data.title: Greeks.live: Bitcoin may hit $90,000, short-term outlook remains optimistic
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.live macro researcher Adam released a Chinese community briefing, which pointed out that the group remains optimistic about the short-term prospects of Bitcoin and believes that the price of Bitcoin still has room to rise and may hit $90,000. At the same time, most members expressed disappointment with Ethereum, believing that its performance is poor, and even called it "waste", showing a bearish sentiment towards ETH. Some users proposed using a currency-based trading strategy combined with trend judgment and platform identification algorithms, which performed relatively stably in both bull and bear markets, with a maximum retracement of about 4%.

data.title: Only 11% of Bitcoin Companies Registered in El Salvador Are Operating Normally
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Among the 181 Bitcoin service providers registered with the Central Bank of El Salvador, only 20 are in operation, and the rest have not met the requirements of the country's Bitcoin Law. Data shows that at least 22 non-operating providers have failed to meet most of the country's Bitcoin laws, which require providers to implement strict supervision of their financial systems. It is reported that El Salvador's Bitcoin law requires providers to maintain an anti-money laundering (AML) program, keep records that accurately reflect the company's assets, liabilities and equity, and develop tailored cybersecurity plans based on the nature of their services. Data shows that 89% of registered providers failed to meet some operational obligations. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Trump: Will speed up the issuance of all necessary licenses to Nvidia
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump said that he would speed up the issuance of all necessary licenses to Nvidia (NVDA.O). Nvidia has previously stated that it will manufacture domestic artificial intelligence supercomputers in the United States for the first time, and plans to produce infrastructure worth up to $500 billion in the United States through cooperation with TSMC and Foxconn. (Jinshi)

data.title: U.S. Economic Outlook: Dollar and Treasury Bonds Expected to Recover
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, economist Jonas Goltermann from Capital Economics has indicated in a report that the U.S. dollar and Treasury bonds are likely to rebound in the coming months. This follows a significant decline attributed to U.S. President Donald Trump's reciprocal tariffs.

Goltermann noted that these tariffs have led to a loss of confidence in the U.S. as a safe haven for its currency and bonds. Despite this, he believes the U.S. economy may avoid a full recession, with the Federal Reserve expected to maintain interest rates this year, potentially restoring favorable interest rate differentials for the dollar. He anticipates that the turmoil in the bond market will subside.

data.title: U.S. President Trump to Expedite Licensing for Companies Committed to U.S.
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump announced plans to accelerate the issuance of all necessary licenses to NVIDIA and other companies dedicated to operations in the United States. This move aims to support businesses that contribute to the country's economic growth and technological advancement.

data.title: Planet Evening News
Nasdaq-listed company NMHI, which is involved in Bitcoin mining, has reached a financing agreement of up to US$2 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nasdaq-listed Nature's Miracle Holding Inc. (NMHI), which is involved in the field of Bitcoin mining, announced that it has reached a financing agreement of up to US$2 million (the initial financing amount is US$600,000), and the investor is Big Lake Capital. At the end of last year, NMHI acquired a majority stake in Bitcoin mining company J&Y Marigold for a total purchase price of US$5.32 million to enter the Bitcoin mining market. Its Bitcoin mining facilities are expected to be put into operation in the first half of 2025. (prnewswire)

data.title: HashFlare Founders Face Conflicting Orders from U.S. Authorities
data.description: According to PANews, the founders of the bankrupt cryptocurrency mining company HashFlare, Sergei Potapenko and Ivan Turõgin, have been ordered by the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (DHS) to leave the country immediately. This directive contradicts a court order requiring them to remain in King County, Washington. Lawyers for the Estonian nationals revealed that DHS sent identical emails on April 6 and April 11, instructing them to depart or face enforcement actions. Prosecutors are currently negotiating with DHS to extend their stay in the United States. Potapenko and Turõgin have previously pleaded guilty and agreed to forfeit $400 million in assets, with sentencing scheduled for August 14.

data.title: Nature's Miracle Holding Secures $2 Million Funding for Bitcoin Mining Expansion
data.description: According to Odaily, Nasdaq-listed company Nature's Miracle Holding Inc. (NMHI) has announced a financing agreement of up to $2 million, with an initial funding amount of $600,000 from Big Lake Capital. Last year, NMHI acquired a majority stake in Bitcoin mining company J&Y Marigold for a total purchase price of $5.32 million, marking its entry into the Bitcoin mining sector. The company's Bitcoin mining facilities are expected to become operational in the first half of 2025.
